entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop analyzed for its business case and impact on poverty and food security in East and Southern Africa.

entities.name: MILLETS
entities.description: Cereal crops analyzed for their business case and suitability for commercialization in East and Southern Africa.

entities.name: EAST AND SOUTHERN AFRICA
entities.description: The geographic region where the research on sorghum and millets is focused.

entities.name: COMMERCIALIZATION
entities.description: The strategy of increasing the commercial market presence of crops.

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: A socio-economic state that sorghum production helps to mitigate.

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The availability and access to food, which is positively impacted by sorghum.

entities.name: EARLY-MATURITY
entities.description: A crop characteristic that reduces the hungry period and increases demand for improved varieties.

entities.name: INTER-REGIONAL TRADE
entities.description: The trade of agricultural products between different regions to support production growth.

entities.name: FLOUR
entities.description: A specialty market product derived from millets.

entities.name: BEER
entities.description: A market product derived from sorghum.
